blended.narrative: Teton Pass Ski Area is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,086 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: overcast, highs of 51°F, gusts to 45 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 11" over the past week. Current depth: 34".
